types.description: The username for a user within Cisco Duo.

types.description: A unique serial number assigned to a USB device by the manufacturer. This type does not expect the `USB/Vendor&Product` prefix only the serial number.

types.name: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint Alert ID

types.description: A username used locally on an endpoint. This username may or may not be associated with additional identifiers such as UPN.
types.name: Local Username

types.description: The unique identifier for the SharePoint item within OneDrive for Business or a SharePoint site.
types.name: Microsoft 365 SharePoint ListItemUniqueID

types.description: The user's name in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint is similar to their Microsoft Entra User Principal Name (UPN) but excludes qualifying domain. For example, the Microsoft Defender for Endpoint User Name for a user with the UPN "user1@contoso.com" would be "user1".
types.name: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint User Name

types.description: The GitHub repository name, including owner.
types.name: GitHub Repository Full Name

types.description: The GitHub repository name. Only integrated-organization owned repositories may be used as a lead value of this type. The repository name is prefixed by the name of the organization that owns it - 'organization-name/repository-name'.
types.name: GitHub Repository Name

types.description: The handle for a GitHub user account.
types.name: GitHub Username

types.description: The SHA-256 hash of the GitHub access token used for authentication.
types.name: GitHub Access Token Hash

types.description: The unique identifier for a user or application login session.
types.name: Microsoft 365 Session ID

types.description: The identifier for a CrowdStrike group.
types.name: CrowdStrike Group ID

types.name: CrowdStrike Device ID

types.description: The identifier for a CrowdStrike alert.
types.name: CrowdStrike Alert ID

types.description: Unique identifier for an AWS Organization or Organizational Unit
types.name: AWS Organization ID

types.description: Globally unique identifier for AWS IAM Policies
types.name: AWS Policy ARN

types.description: User-Agent from HTTP headers
types.name: User-Agent

types.description: The unique identifier for some physical device registered with Microsoft Entra.
types.name: Microsoft Entra Device ID

types.description: A Uniform Resource Locator.
types.name: URL

types.description: The unique identifier for a message in Microsoft 365 Exchange.
types.name: Microsoft 365 Message ID

types.description: Unique GUID identifier for the email message, generated by Microsoft 365. This identifier is used to identify a message within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem, and should not be confused with the public-facing identifier InternetMessageId. An example value is 0fc34667-4e95-4b18-b8c7-450021496754.
types.name: Microsoft 365 Network Message ID

types.description: An email address.
types.name: Email Address

types.description: A domain name.
types.name: Domain Name

types.description: A file name.
types.name: File Name

types.description: The unique identifier for a Microsoft Defender for Endpoint monitored Machine or Device.
types.name: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint Machine ID

types.description: An IP address.
types.name: IP Address

types.description: An MD5 checksum.
types.name: MD5

types.description: A 256 bit SHA-2 cryptographic hash.
types.name: SHA 256

types.description: A 160 bit SHA-1 cryptographic hash.
types.name: SHA 1

types.description: A host name.
types.name: Host Name

types.description: The unique identifier for an installed application in Microsoft Entra.
types.name: Microsoft Entra Application ID

types.description: The unique identifier for a Microsoft Microsoft Entra Service Principal.
types.name: Microsoft Entra Service Principal ID

types.description: A Microsoft 365 Exchange Identity is a value that uniquely identifies a mailbox and can be any one of Name, Alias, Distinguished name (DN), Canonical DN, Domain\Username, Email address, GUID, LegacyExchangeDN, SamAccountName, User ID, or User Principal Name.
types.name: Microsoft 365 Exchange Identity

types.description: The unique identifier for a mailbox in Microsoft 365 Exchange.
types.name: Microsoft 365 Mailbox GUID

types.description: A Microsoft User Principal Name ('UPN') is a unique identifier for users in a Windows domain network. It follows an email-like format (username@domain.com) and is primarily used in Active Directory environments for authentication and resource management.
types.name: Microsoft Entra User Principal Name

types.description: The globally unique identifier for any directory object in Microsoft Entra ID. Every resource - users, groups, mailboxes, installed application, etc - will have a GUID of this type.
types.name: Microsoft Entra Object ID
